translations.landing.pricing.faq.a1: Yes, you can Yükselt or downgrade your cloud Plan at any time. For Çevrimdışı licenses, you can Yükselt by paying the difference.
translations.landing.pricing.faq.a3: Yes, we offer a 30-day money-back guarantee for all paid plans. No questions asked.
translations.landing.pricing.faq.a4: Absolutely! The open Kaynak core is MIT licensed. You can use it for any purpose, including commercial projects.
translations.landing.pricing.faq.a5: Yes. Flyto2 runs entirely on your computer. Your data never leaves your machine, regardless of which Plan you're on.
translations.landing.pricing.faq.a6: The Ücretsiz Plan has generous limits that reset every month. If you reach the limit, you can wait for the İleri month or Yükselt to Pro for unlimited access.
translations.landing.pricing.faq.a7: No. The Ücretsiz Plan requires no credit card, no Hesap and no commitment. Just İndir and Başlat automating.
translations.landing.pricing.faq.a8: Desktop Pro runs on your computer — perfect for privacy and Çevrimdışı use. Cloud plans Ekle Takım Özellikler like shared İş akışları and collaboration.

translations.landing.pricing.why.feature1Desc: İndir and Başlat using immediately. No sign-up, no credit card, no E-posta verification needed.
